metadata.description: Comprehensive calculation rules for moving logistics including stairs, elevators, batching, and time estimates

baseRules.description: Ground floor/main level rates serve as base rates. All surcharges multiply against these amounts.
baseRules.baseHandlingTime: Use small/minimal values from items file for flat ground/main floor loading

accessMultipliers.stackableBonus: big savings on elevator/stairs since multiple carried at once

boxesBinsRules.description: Specific rules for standard moving boxes and plastic bins

stackableDollyTime.description: Time per box when using dolly (0.5 min base)

volumeDiscount.description: Reduced time per box for large quantities due to flow efficiency

timePerFlight.note: small items can be batched for efficiency

fatigueMultiplier.description: Optional fatigue kicker for multiple flights

bulkyPenalty.description: Additional penalty per floor for bulky/awkward items (stairs only)

cap.description: For very bulky/heavy items, add +5-10 min max instead of compounding

bulkyPenalty.logic: Captures landing turns, hand switches, and set-down/re-grip behavior

timePerRide.note: small items can be batched efficiently

highFloorAdder.description: Extra travel time for floors ≥10 (total, not per ride)

elevatorCalculation.logic: Elevators benefit from batching and wheeled transport, maintain clear advantage over stairs

batchingRules.description: Rules for combining items in single trips to optimize efficiency

general.definition: One ride/trip = one continuous trip through access constraint
general.principle: Apply access adders per ride/trip, not per individual item

stackableSmallItems.rule: 1 ride per dolly/cart load, not per item

lightFlatItems.rule: Bundle/stack safely, treat bundle as 1 ride

softGoods.rule: Tote/bag when possible, 1 tote = 1 box equivalent

sectionalModular.timeRule: 11 min first piece + 3 min each additional piece
sectionalModular.accessRule: Apply stairs/elevator per piece if separate travel required
sectionalModular.batchingException: If two small modules carried together, treat as 1 ride

bulkyAwkward.exception: Two smaller components safely carried together may count as 1 ride

mattressesBoxSprings.rule: 1 mattress/box per ride (protective carry, don't batch)

outdoorFurniture.stackable: Stack cushions and light chairs (2-4 per ride)

batchingRules.safetyOverride: When in doubt, don't batch—default to 1 piece = 1 ride for heavy, fragile, or awkward items
batchingRules.efficiencyTip: When batching increases, item handling time per piece decreases but access time stays per ride

unloadMultipliers.description: Unloads are faster because items are pre-disassembled, wrapped, and staged
unloadMultipliers.baseRule: Apply Base Unload Multiplier (BUM) first, then add destination access adders

components.baseLoad: Base loading time from items + handling

quoteRangeRules.description: Generate quote ranges for estimates ≥ 2.0 hours

notes.scaling: Ranges widen as jobs get bigger, small jobs keep tight windows
notes.riskAdjustment: For riskier access (lots of stairs, long carries, elevators), bump one tier up
